action_set_definitions.name: get_pnr_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves comprehensive information for a given PNR ID, including the list of passengers, their specific Special Service Request (SSR) codes, and the details of the disrupted itinerary (origin, destination, and original departure time).

pnr_id.description: The unique identifier for the booking group (e.g., 'G-PNR-NYC88').

action_set_definitions.name: get_system_time
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current simulation time. Crucial for calculating connection feasibility and verifying the operational lockout status.

action_set_definitions.name: search_alternative_flights
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the flight inventory for available alternative flights between specified airports on a given date.

origin.description: The IATA code for the departure airport.

destination.description: The IATA code for the arrival airport.

travel_date.description: The date of travel in YYYY-MM-DD format.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_rebooking
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes the rebooking process by assigning passengers to specific alternative flights. Updates the booking status to REBOOKED upon success.

state_description.passenger_profile: Details of the passenger including name, loyalty tier (e.g., Gold, Silver), and contact info.
state_description.disrupted_itinerary: The original flight details that were disrupted (canceled or delayed).
state_description.flight_inventory: A list of available alternative flights with their current seat capacity and class availability.
state_description.booking_status: The current status of the rebooking process (e.g., UNRESOLVED, PENDING_CONFIRMATION, REBOOKED).
state_description.system_timestamp: The current simulation time to calculate connection feasibility.

passenger_profile.name: Global Scholars Group (22 Pax: 19 ADT, 3 WCHR)
